content:
The modern game of Roulette has been in existence since the late 18th century. However, historians believe that a more primitive form of the game was introduced already in the 17th century by Blaise Pascal. France was the first country to bring this game into the form it is now known to be.

A number wheel, some colorful number slots, and a ball proved to be just the elements needed for a table game to reach astonishing heights of popularity. Over the years, the Roulette game has gained immense popularity through land-based casinos and from the evolution of newer platforms like online casinos and live casinos.

The game of Roulette has a prolonged history of existence and establishment. But not everybody is fortunate enough to play the game because of the casino barring laws that exist in countries. If you still have been unaware of the game because of staying in India, this is just the place where you can learn all about Roulette.

Play Roulette online for real money today!

Roulette is no doubt one of the invigorating online table games that are preferred by all avid gamblers across the globe owing to its easy rules and super exciting gameplay. Roulette is solely a game of luck and chance and there is no strategy that guarantees you a win. Rigorous practise is the key!

The game of Roulette is quite simple to learn, and you can easily master it with a little practice. There are a number of online Roulette variants that you can explore and discover, but do bear in mind that the gameplay is basically the same for all of them. All you have to do is select the numbers you want to wager on, put your chips on the corresponding number and then watch the ball spin on the wheel. If your wager matches where the ball lands, collect your wins and play again. It’s that simple!

Explore the thrill of online Roulette by choosing a safe and secure online casino recommended by us. Remember, to read the game rules and understand the betting process before you start playing for real money. Good luck there!

History of Roulette

As we are here to learn the game inside-out, why not start from scratch?

Roulette is just like several other casino games. The origin of this game is still unknown to the world. However, the traces of this game have been found in France, in the 18th century. But as mentioned above, the pieces of evidence do not tell about its origin. Many historians believe that Roulette was first introduced in the 17th century. What is known to us is that this game became an integral part of casinos in the 19th and 20th centuries. People went gaga over the thrills it was capable of delivering, owing to its unpredictable game course. Hence, soon the game started becoming popular and made a name at places that were never in its range. However, a storm was about to hit the game. A storm that would take it to distances where casino gambling could be offensive and punishable.

Online casinos emerged as the new face of the casino in the early twenty-first century. They carried the spinning wheel game to places like India that have strict laws to prohibit casino gambling. How? Read below to find out!

The legality of online Roulette in India

India is one of those countries that strictly prohibits land casino gambling across the country. Apart from the states like Goa, Sikkim, and Daman, no other states allow land-based casino gambling. However, the law that exists in India talks only about land-based gambling. No state other than Maharashtra mentions anything about online gambling. Online casinos make use of this absence and provide their services in this casino-deprived country. So, a country where players never got access to play the classic casino games like Roulette and Blackjack can now play these games in the comfort of their homes.

In this way, Indians can also now get the excitement of playing the most thrilling game of casino – Roulette.

How does online Roulette work

We have all heard a lot about online casinos offering a great opportunity to experience the likes of casino games in the comfort of our homes. But have you ever wondered how it works? Have you ever been worried about the authenticity of the game which is not being conducted in front of your eyes? We will here try to give you a comprehensive answer to all these questions.

If you see how Roulette is played in a land-based casino, you will come to know that the game is conducted by a dealer who spins the wheel at a random speed, producing random results. Whereas, the online variant doesn’t have a dealer appointed for the game until you are playing live Roulette. Such an online Roulette game is conducted and kept authentic with the help of the most trusted technology that was designed to produce random results – The Random Number Generator (RNG). The RNG is a technology that generates a random number each time you trigger it. So when you hit the ‘spin’ button on your screen, the RNG generates a random number and translates it into a number present on the table to bring out the final result. This technology has earned appreciation from all over the world and therefore, can be trusted for online Roulette gaming.

The case with Live Roulette is completely different from the online Roulette. Live Roulette is conducted in a live studio by a real live dealer. It is similar to how Roulette is conducted in a land-based casino, the difference here is that the table is not actually in front of your eyes. Rather, it is streamed to you via an internet connection and live coverage.

Benefits of playing Roulette online

As we discussed earlier, the game going online has enabled the people of India to play a casino game without leaving the country or visiting a casino in Goa. However, this is not the only benefit that online Roulette gaming brings to the table. There are several others that make online Roulette gaming special.

  • The diversity – The internet provides a limitless platform for game providers to create countless varieties of the classic game. More variety of Roulette is a great opportunity to explore and have fun in playing Roulette with a touch of newness every time.
  • Easy and fast payments – All the good online casinos have a plethora of payment options for the player’s convenience. Therefore, in a game that requires repetitive betting, the ability to make quick and easy transactions is nothing less than a boon for the player.
  • The comfort of being able to play anytime, anywhere – This is the best benefit of playing Roulette online. While the original game cannot be played anywhere other than on the table, online gaming lets you carry the game anywhere you go. Moreover, online casinos are operable 24×7. So, you can play a Roulette game at a time that suits your routine. You will not have to dress up and reach a casino before it closes, open the game, log-in and start playing.
  • A lot of platforms to try on – Imagine you are at a casino. You are playing a Roulette game and suddenly you see that the happy hours have ended at the payout ratio has been decreased by the casino. Reaching out to another casino to find a suitable table now can be a hectic job to do. Not in an online casino. You always find a place and can make your account at multiple casinos. If you don’t find a place to be appropriate, you can quickly move on to the next.
  • Bonuses all around – No matter which land-based casino you go to, no Roulette table will offer you any kind of bonus. They may have occasional discounts but a bonus is non-existing offline. On the other side, online casinos attach several attractive bonuses to appeal to new and old players.

Understanding the game

Before getting into the game, the components and the layout of the game needs to be discussed elaborately. The Roulette game is played on a table that has a spinning wheel and a betting table layout. The wheel has 37 or 38 colorful slots, namely red, black and green, carved into it with a sequence of numbers written on them. The sequence of these numbers and the number of slots vary with the variant of Roulette you are playing on.

On the betting table, the appointed dealer of the game priorly asks all the players to place their bets on the preferred number or set of numbers. Placing a bet is simple, as you just have to decide the betting amount higher than the minimum bet and choose the type of bet. The wheel is then spun and a small metallic ball is shot opposite to the direction of the wheel’s movement. The slot in which the ball ends when the wheel stops rotating is the fortune decider of this game.

Simple as it may sound, but the unpredictability and last moment thrills of this game make it one of the most exciting classic table games of casinos.
title: Roulette
